data.description: AMD CEO SAYS COMPANY WILL PAY 15% TAX ON MI308 CHIP EXPORTS TO CHINA

data.title: Small caps and Nasdaq up; weekly jobless claims surprise; AI stock Snowflake plunges. Robinhood hits key level.
data.description: Today, the stock market saw small cap companies driving gains, while the Nasdaq experienced a slight increase on Thursday due to unexpected weekly jobless claims. Snowflake, an AI stock, faced a significant drop in earnings. Small caps were up, and the Nasdaq recovered from minor losses. Additionally, Robinhood reclaimed an important chart level. This information was provided by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: New Era Support Services joins PurposeCare, celebrating with a record-breaking event at Taco Dale Cantina in OSWEGO, IL. Expanded home-based care across 5 Illinois counties.
data.description: In Oswego, Illinois on December 4, 2025, the community came together to commemorate a momentous occasion at Taco Dale Cantina with a ribbon-cutting ceremony, marking a new chapter in their development. The event drew in a record-breaking number of attendees as they celebrated the expansion of home-based care services across five counties in Illinois. New Era Support Services made their official debut at the event, signifying a significant milestone in the community's health and well-being initiatives.

data.title: 30 new games added to GeForce NOW's cloud gaming library, including 'Hogwarts Legacy' and Activision titles on Ubisoft+, for the holiday season.
data.description: GeForce NOW has broadened its cloud gaming selection with 30 fresh titles, such as 'Hogwarts Legacy' and the initial Activision games on Ubisoft+. This move bolsters their collection for the holiday period, making it more appealing for gamers to engage with.

data.title: Consumers Energy investing in gas system upgrades during winter in Michigan, saving customer money.
data.description: In Jackson, Michigan on December 4th, 2025, Consumers Energy is focusing on enhancing Michigan's natural gas reliability and infrastructure during the winter season, aiming to save customer funds. Despite the chilling weather, the company is committed to implementing upgrades and initiatives. Consumers Energy is dedicated to ensuring the resilience of the natural gas network, creating a positive impact on customers.

data.title: Sun Life U.S. recognized as Top Place to Work by Boston Globe for 8th year, including offices in Milwaukee, KC, Baltimore, & Hartford.
data.description: WELLESLEY, Massachusetts - On December 4, 2025, it was announced that Sun Life U.S. has achieved the prestigious recognition of being named a Top Place to Work by the Boston Globe for the eighth year in a row. This accolade adds to the company's prior distinctions in Milwaukee, Kansas City, Missouri, Baltimore, and Hartford, Connecticut, where Sun Life also maintains offices. The continuous recognition demonstrates the company's commitment to providing a positive work environment for its employees across different locations.

data.title: TorchForge RL pipelines now live on Together AI's cloud, offering distributed training and a BlackJack demo. #AI #Tech #Innovation
data.description: Together AI has rolled out TorchForge RL pipelines on its cloud platform, aiming to boost distributed training and sandboxed environments. Notably, they have included a BlackJack training demo as part of this introduction, showcasing the capabilities of the system. This move is expected to benefit users looking for efficient and effective machine learning solutions, with potential impacts on businesses and researchers alike.

data.title: NORD urges Congress to reauthorize Rare Pediatric Disease Voucher Program with 63 vouchers for 47 diseases, 43 new treatments.
data.description: A recent report from NORD reveals that 63 FDA vouchers have led to significant advancements in treating 47 rare pediatric diseases, with 43 of them having no prior treatments available. This progress marks a breakthrough for children who were previously overlooked. The organization is calling on Congress for support following these unprecedented developments.

data.title: Claritycon2026 Children's Mental Health Conference on July 13-14, 2026, 2 full days, Early Bird Pricing till 4-30-26, by Clarity Child Guidance Center offering mental health services for children aged 3-17.
data.description: The duration of the event has been extended to cover two full days. Early Bird Pricing will be available until April 30, 2026. Located in San Antonio, the Clarity Child Guidance Center has been in operation since 1886. As the sole nonprofit entity in South Texas, it offers a range of mental health services for children between the ages of 3 and 17, as well as support for their families in coping with various challenges.
ARGAN and DECATHLON have partnered to reduce carbon emissions, aiming to achieve a significant decrease in their carbon footprint.

data.title: TD Cowen becomes more bearish on $60B Bitcoin company Strategy due to $1.44B cash reserve and potential Bitcoin sales, lowering MSTR target.
data.description: Following the establishment of a $1.44 billion cash reserve by Strategy, it has been disclosed that there may be a need to sell Bitcoin. Consequently, TD Cowen has revised its price target for MSTR downwards.

data.title: Haute-Chaudière Wind Project in Quebec secures financing for 124MW project; construction set to begin after government approval.
data.description: In Montréal, EDF power solutions Canada and Énergie Renouvelable Granit Inc. have secured non-recourse construction and term financing for the Haute-Chaudière Wind project, a 124MW initiative in Quebec's Regional County Municipality of Granit. This achievement comes after receiving authorization from the Government of Quebec, allowing the project to proceed. The necessary capital for the venture has been finalized, marking a significant step forward in the project's development.

data.title: Q3 sees decrease in earnings year-over-year, with nearly 25% facing functional unemployment. Washington, Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: A recent report reveals that approximately 25% of workers are struggling to secure full-time positions that offer wages above the poverty line. This survey, conducted by the Ludwig Institute, highlights a concerning trend where middle-income workers are experiencing a decline in their earnings compared to the previous year. The data suggests that a significant portion of the workforce is facing challenges related to "functional unemployment."

data.title: Photographer Alex Webb presents "Italianness" in 2026 Lavazza Calendar at Art Basel Miami Beach, Dec. 2025.
data.description: Renowned photographer Alex Webb is showcasing his exploration of "Italianness" through a collection of photographs at the Miami Beach Convention Center during the Art Basel Miami Beach 2025 event. Additionally, an offsite exhibition will be held in Miami's Design District. The exhibition is set to feature a diverse range of images and will be open to the public from December 4, 2025. This event is part of Art Basel Miami Beach, a gathering that attracts over 70,000 visitors annually and showcases works from leading artists worldwide. Webb's exhibition is expected to draw significant attention and contribute to the cultural vibrancy of the event.
